name: generated_theater_cast_20260629
notes: Seventeen fictional adult cast references generated in Higgsfield for TikTok/Seedance story videos. Images are intentionally committed for reusable cast selection. The earlier blond male guide is intentionally excluded.

default_generation_policy.voiceover: Higgsfield ElevenLabs or approved external TTS
default_generation_policy.reference_policy: Use one primary character reference per Seedance clip; use other cast members as prompt-described background/cameo actors.
default_generation_policy.disclosure_policy: Confirm AIGC disclosure requirements before public ads.

rights_notes: All cast members are fictional AI-generated adults.
Do not present them as real customers, real influencers, celebrities, doctors, experts, or actual reviewers.
Do not imitate or name a specific real person, idol, celebrity, protected character, or third-party brand.
Do not use the removed blond male guide as a default cast member.
For commercial or paid ad use, run the normal rights, claim, LP, and platform review checks.
